title: derris obtusus
intro: Derris obtusus, also known as the toxic plant of the Derris genus, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural insecticide and anti-parasitic agent, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Derris obtusus include its use in treating malaria, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects. Derris obtusus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
